divorce_indicators.description: Combinations that statistically correlate with separation

key_findings: 7th/2nd Lords in 6/8/12 houses showed high correlation
Venus affliction present in 85% of cases

high_risk_combinations.description: Marriage significator in dusthana houses indicates conflict, obstacles, or losses
Family harmony significator afflicted - affects marital stability
Love and relationship karaka in difficult houses
Severe affliction to marriage house - conflict and delay

high_risk_combinations.condition: Rahu in 7th house with no benefic aspect

high_risk_combinations.description: Detachment and lack of interest in partnership
Brings conflicts and disputes into marriage
Weak significator unable to sustain marriage
Brings disputes and active conflict into marriage
Transforms or destroys marriage - crisis prone

separative_planets.description: Planets that cause separation when affecting 7th house
separative_planets.Saturn: Delays and creates distance. If aspects 7th, separation after long time

multiple_marriage_indicators.condition: Dual signs (Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces) on 7th cusp
multiple_marriage_indicators.description: Indicates possibility of more than one marriage

multiple_marriage_indicators.condition: Venus in dual sign AND afflicted
Jupiter in dual sign AND afflicted
Upapada Lagna (UL) dual sign + UL2 activated

passion_and_commitment_indicators.description: Indicators of strong desire nature, emotional restlessness, or contextual vulnerabilities (formerly Infidelity Risk)

warning_signs.description: Obsessive desires, attraction to unconventional or hidden relationship dynamics
Intense physical drive, potential for secret or private connections
Fusion of romance and marriage; passion is a prerequisite for commitment
Romantic life linked to secrecy or transformative hidden experiences

warning_signs.condition: Venus in Gemini/Dual sign with affliction
warning_signs.description: Changeable nature in love, tendency to seek variety or mental stimulation

stabilizers.effect: Mitigates impulsive desires, provides moral grounding
Strong sense of duty and longevity over fleeting passion
